title: Cloud Run durable architecture for n8n
mermaid:
flowchart TD
    U["User / webhook provider"] --> CR["Cloud Run service: n8n"]
    CR -->|"DB_TYPE=postgresdb"| SQL["Cloud SQL PostgreSQL"]
    CR -->|"Secret env vars"| SM["Secret Manager"]
    CR -->|"runtime identity"| SA["n8n Cloud Run service account"]
    SA -->|"roles/cloudsql.client"| SQL
    SA -->|"roles/secretmanager.secretAccessor"| SM
    CR --> LOG["Cloud Logging and Cloud Monitoring"]
    CR --> URL["WEBHOOK_URL / N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL"]

easyMode.stateModel: Not suitable for durable n8n state
easyMode.risk: Redeploy, revision replacement, or scale-to-zero can make state unreliable

durableMode.stateModel: Cloud SQL PostgreSQL for main state, Secret Manager for sensitive data, service account for controlled access
durableMode.risk: More components must be assembled and maintained

components.name: Cloud Run service
components.responsibility: Run the n8n container and receive editor/webhook/API traffic
n8nSettings: Container image pinned to a known n8n version
WEBHOOK_URL and N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL set to stable HTTPS URL

components.name: Cloud SQL PostgreSQL
components.responsibility: Persist workflows, credentials, and execution history

components.name: Secret Manager
components.responsibility: Store DB password, N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY, and other secrets

components.name: Cloud Run service account
components.responsibility: Runtime identity for accessing Cloud SQL and Secret Manager

components.name: Cloud Logging and Cloud Monitoring
components.responsibility: Collect logs, request metrics, revision health, and alerts

acceptanceChecks: n8n connects to Cloud SQL PostgreSQL and does not use container filesystem as main state
DB password and N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY are injected from Secret Manager
Cloud Run runtime identity is a dedicated service account with least-privilege roles
WEBHOOK_URL and N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL use stable HTTPS public URL
Cloud SQL backup retention and restore drill are documented
Redeploy test confirms workflows, credentials, and execution history persist
